    R

    Ranch - Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Represents a Ranch structure in the game world.
    Ranch(Player, int) - Constructor for class jogo.models.Structures.Ranch
    Constructs a new Ranch structure, initializing its base farming yields, building prerequisites, and assigning its ownership to the specified player.
    RANCH - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.Structures.StructuresType
    Represents an agricultural livestock establishment that harvests food supplies.
    RanchTest - Class in models.Structures
    Test class for the Ranch class.
    RanchTest() - Constructor for class models.Structures.RanchTest
     
    random - Static variable in class jogo.engine.Events
     
    removeDontHavingEnoughResources() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if removing resources fails when the player does not have enough.
    removeHavingEnoughResources() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if resources are removed correctly when the player has enough.
    removeResource(ResourceType, int) - Method in class jogo.models.Player
    Attempts to deduct a specified quantity of a resource from the inventory.
    resetAP() - Method in class jogo.models.Player
    Resets the player's current Action Points in the inventory back to their baseline value.
    ResourceType - Enum Class in jogo.models
    Defines the types of resources available within the game economy.
